variables.input:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { status = parsed[resultType] }
| fields status

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { severity = parsed[properties][severity] }
| fields severity

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { attackedResourceType = parsed[properties][attackedResourceType] }
| fields attackedResourceType

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { level = parsed[level] }
| fields level

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { location = parsed[location] }
| fields location

0.title: Total Alerts
0.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize totalCount = count()

1.title: Active Alerts
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[resultType] == "Active"
| summarize activeCount = count()

2.title: High Severity
2.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][severity] == "High"
| summarize highCount = count()

3.title: Medium Severity
3.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][severity] == "Medium"
| summarize mediumCount = count()

4.title: Low Severity
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][severity] == "Low"
| summarize lowCount = count()

5.title: Virtual Machine Attacks
5.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][attackedResourceType] == "Virtual Machine"
| summarize vmCount = count()

6.title: Unique Compromised Entities
6.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize entityCount = countDistinct(parsed[properties][compromisedEntity])

7.title: By Severity
7.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], attackedResourceType = parsed[properties][attackedResourceType], level = parsed[level], location = parsed[location]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(attackedResourceType, array($AttackedResourceType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| summarize count = count(), by: { severity = parsed[properties][severity] }

8.title: By Attacked Resource Type
8.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], severity = parsed[properties][severity], level = parsed[level], location = parsed[location]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(severity, array($Severity))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| summarize count = count(), by: { attackedResourceType = parsed[properties][attackedResourceType] }

9.title: By Status
9.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd severity = parsed[properties][severity], attackedResourceType = parsed[properties][attackedResourceType], level = parsed[level], location = parsed[location]
| filter in(severity, array($Severity))
| filter in(attackedResourceType, array($AttackedResourceType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| summarize count = count(), by: { status = parsed[resultType] }

10.title: By Compromised Entity
10.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], severity = parsed[properties][severity], attackedResourceType = parsed[properties][attackedResourceType], level = parsed[level]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(severity, array($Severity))
| filter in(attackedResourceType, array($AttackedResourceType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| summarize count = count(), by: { compromisedEntity = parsed[properties][compromisedEntity] }

11.title: Security Alerts Summary
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd
    eventName = parsed[properties][eventName],
    severity = parsed[properties][severity],
    compromisedEntity = parsed[properties][compromisedEntity],
    attackedResourceType = parsed[properties][attackedResourceType],
    status = parsed[resultType],
    level = parsed[level],
    location = parsed[location],
    eventTime = parsed[time]
| fieldsRemove parsed, content
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(severity, array($Severity))
| filter in(attackedResourceType, array($AttackedResourceType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| sort eventTime desc
| fields eventName, severity, compromisedEntity, attackedResourceType, status, level, location, eventTime

12.title: Alert Details
12.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd
    eventName = parsed[properties][eventName],
    severity = parsed[properties][severity],
    compromisedEntity = parsed[properties][compromisedEntity],
    attackedResourceType = parsed[properties][attackedResourceType],
    status = parsed[resultType],
    level = parsed[level],
    location = parsed[location],
    resultDescription = parsed[resultDescription],
    remediationSteps = parsed[properties][remediationSteps],
    intent = parsed[properties][intent]
| fieldsRemove parsed, content
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(severity, array($Severity))
| filter in(attackedResourceType, array($AttackedResourceType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| sort timestamp desc
| fields eventName, severity, compromisedEntity, attackedResourceType, status, resultDescription, remediationSteps, intent

13.title: Timeline of Security Alerts
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], attackedResourceType = parsed[properties][attackedResourceType], level = parsed[level], location = parsed[location]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(attackedResourceType, array($AttackedResourceType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| summarize count = count(), by: { timeframe = bin(timestamp, 1h), severity = parsed[properties][severity] }

14.title: By Location
14.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Security"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], severity = parsed[properties][severity], attackedResourceType = parsed[properties][attackedResourceType], level = parsed[level]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(severity, array($Severity))
| filter in(attackedResourceType, array($AttackedResourceType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| summarize count = count(), by: { location = parsed[location] }
